data.body: As for inflation, modern US economic policy basically reflects a trade-off made decades ago: we trade a weak labor market for the ability to buy stuff cheaply. Mild inflation is toxic now because cheap stuff was the only thing left about the US economy that benefitted the lower and middle classes.
